title: canarium denticulatum subsp. denticulatum
intro: Canarium denticulatum subsp. denticulatum, also known as the 'Tree of Life', is a species of evergreen tree native to the Pacific Island regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Canarium denticulatum subsp. denticulatum include extracts and oils, which can be used in traditional medicine and skincare products.
